author: anon-13168fa2
content: Added 'What a Design Doc Actually Looks Like' subsection to 01-talking-to-agents/03-context-is-everything.md with a complete worked example for a habit tracker project. The example uses all the sections a novice will encounter in later chapters (Purpose, Features, Technology, Interface, Constraints, Out of Scope, Success Criteria) and is followed by annotation explaining what each section accomplishes. This gives readers a concrete template to imitate before 04-breaking-problems-down and 05-first-build ask them to write one, and matches the spec called out in #40.
